---
title: "R Markdown Notebook"
author: "Test User"
date: "2023-01-01"
output: html_document
---

# Introduction

This is an R Markdown document with mixed R and Python chunks.

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Section

Here's an R chunk:

```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Python Section

And a Python chunk:

```{python}
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({'x': [1, 2, 3], 'y': [4, 5, 6]})
df
```

## Mixed Content

Some markdown text between chunks.

```{r}
mean(cars$speed)
```

```{python}
print("Hello from Python")
```
